parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ callSid: $json.sid, status: $json.status, message: 'מחבר שיחה - ענה לטלפון שלך!' }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT '{{ $json.phone }}' AS phone, COALESCE((SELECT followup_stage FROM leads WHERE phone = '{{ $json.phone }}' LIMIT 1), '') AS followup_stage, COALESCE((SELECT state FROM leads WHERE phone = '{{ $json.phone }}' LIMIT 1), '') AS current_state
{{ 'SELECT id, name, phone, followup_stage, followup_concern, followup_conversation FROM leads WHERE phone = \'' + $json.phone + '\' LIMIT 1' }}
{{ 'UPDATE leads SET followup_stage = \'resolved\' WHERE id = ' + $('Parse Intent').item.json.leadId }}

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value: האם לשלוח לך קישור לקביעת פגישה? 📅

parameters.query: {{ "UPDATE leads SET followup_stage = 'asked_to_schedule', followup_conversation = '" + JSON.stringify($('Build Objection Context').item.json.newConversation).replace(/'/g, "''" ) + "'::jsonb WHERE id = " + $('Build Objection Context').item.json.leadId }}

{{ "UPDATE leads SET followup_stage = 'objection_handling', followup_conversation = '" + JSON.stringify($('Parse GPT Response').item.json.updatedConversation).replace(/'/g, "''" ) + "'::jsonb WHERE id = " + $('Parse GPT Response').item.json.leadId }}

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json; const name = body.name || 'לא ידוע'; const phone = body.phone || ''; const score = body.score || 0; const answers = (typeof body.answers === 'string') ? JSON.parse(body.answers || '{}') : (body.answers || {}); const completedAt = body.completed_at ? new Date(body.completed_at).toLocaleString('he-IL', { timeZone: 'Asia/Jerusalem' }) : 'לא ידוע'; const scoreMap = { 1: '1/4', 2: '2/4', 3: '3/4', 4: '4/4' }; const ageStr = answers.age || 'לא ידוע'; const budgetStr = scoreMap[answers.budget] || 'לא ידוע'; const hoursStr = scoreMap[answers.hours] || 'לא ידוע'; const familiarityStr = scoreMap[answers.familiarity] || 'לא ידוע'; const understandingStr = answers.understanding ? `${answers.understanding}/3` : 'לא ידוע'; const parentsStr = answers.parents ? scoreMap[answers.parents] : 'לא רלוונטי'; const availabilityStr = answers.availability || 'לא ידוע'; const meetingStr = answers.meetingType || 'לא ידוע'; const subject = `🔥 ליד חם חדש - ${name} | ${phone}`; const htmlBody = `

🔥 ליד חם חדש!

נכנס ב-${completedAt}

📊 ניקוד ${score}/25
👤 שם ${name}
📱 טלפון +${phone}
🎂 גיל ${ageStr}
📚 היכרות ${familiarityStr}
🤝 הבנה ${understandingStr}
⏰ שעות פנויות ${hoursStr}
💰 תקציב ${budgetStr}
👨‍👩‍👧 תמיכת הורים ${parentsStr}
📅 זמינות ${availabilityStr}
📞 סוג פגישה ${meetingStr}
⚡ יש לחזור ללקוח בהקדם האפשרי!
`; return [{ json: { subject, htmlBody, name, phone } }];

parameters.query: SELECT id, name, phone, notes, salesperson FROM leads WHERE sale_status = 'thinking' AND followup_sent_at IS NULL AND updated_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 days' LIMIT 50

{{ 'UPDATE leads SET followup_sent_at = NOW(), followup_stage = \'awaiting_reply\', followup_concern = \'' + $node['Parse Concern + Build Message'].json.concern + '\' WHERE id = ' + $node['Parse Concern + Build Message'].json.leadId }}
UPDATE public.leads SET farewell_sent_at = NOW(), farewell_screenshots = 0 WHERE phone = '{{ $("Format WhatsApp Params").item.json.toPhone.replace("whatsapp:+", "") }}'
UPDATE public.leads SET farewell_screenshots = farewell_screenshots + 1 WHERE phone = '{{ $json.phone }}'
SELECT phone, name, farewell_sent_at, farewell_screenshots FROM public.leads WHERE phone = '{{ $json.phone }}'

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: $('🔍 פענוח Twilio').item.json }];
